summary: PASSED - install-standard-pack endpoint now returns controlled JSON response (200) with failed_countries when DB issues occur. No longer returns 503 DB_ERROR. verify-standard-pack continues to work correctly.

minor.issue: UTF8/SQL_ASCII conversion error prevents actual layout seeding
minor.note: This is a separate DB encoding issue, not related to the 503 fix being tested

critical_code_review_comments: The fix at lines 3020-3050 correctly wraps _ensure_layout_page_type_enum_values() to return controlled response on DB error
Each country operation (lines 3077-3110) also has proper exception handling with failed_countries population
context_for_next_testing_agent: install-standard-pack endpoint now correctly returns 200 with controlled JSON response containing failed_countries array when DB errors occur. The UTF8/SQL_ASCII encoding error is a separate issue affecting the actual layout data seeding.

install_standard_pack_db_fallback.expected_behavior: Return 200 with {ok, summary, results, failed_countries} on DB error
install_standard_pack_db_fallback.actual_behavior: Returns 200 with JSON response, failed_countries populated with error details
install_standard_pack_db_fallback.previous_issue: Was returning 503 with DB_ERROR in iterations 140-142

verify_standard_pack.response_structure: {ok, module, countries, summary: {ready_rows, total_rows, ready_ratio}, items}
